claim: | [Hacker News](https://news.ycombinator.com/) | YC-run social filter; full-spectrum (AI, infra, indie, business) | Largest dev/founder readership; score correlates strongly with quality among social aggregators, and "front page" is still t

| [Lobsters](https://lobste.rs/) ([lobsters/lobsters](https://github.com/lobsters/lobsters) ⭐ 4.7k) | Invite-only, tag-scoped technical posts | Transparent moderation, no politics, smaller volume → higher signal-to-noise than HN; off-topic

| [r/LocalLLaMA](https://www.reddit.com/r/LocalLLaMA/) | ~686k members; running open models on local hardware | New families (Gemma, Qwen, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax) gain traction here before mainstream coverage — practical consensus forms bef

| [alphaXiv](https://www.alphaxiv.org/) | arXiv front-end with per-paper threaded discussion + author-follow | Replaces Karpathy's [arxiv-sanity-lite](https://github.com/karpathy/arxiv-sanity-lite) ⭐ 1.6k for most users; the trending list i
| [TLDR AI](https://tldr.tech/ai) | Daily | 1.25M+ | 5-min engineer/data-science briefing — the default morning skim
| [Import AI](https://importai.substack.com/) | Weekly | 96k+ | Policy, safety, frontier research — Jack Clark (Anthropic co-founder)
| [The Batch](https://www.deeplearning.ai/the-batch/) | Weekly | — | Andrew Ng's roundup — researcher/learner framing
| [AlphaSignal](https://alphasignal.ai/) | Weekly | 180k+ | "By researchers for researchers" — hardware, ML, trending GitHub
- Multi-source dashboards (Particle, Ground News, Feedly) — built for general news; oversized for engineers already reading HN + Lobsters
